name: Architecture Reviewer
description: Reviews system architecture for scalability, maintainability, and best practices.
longDescription: Analyzes your codebase architecture, identifies structural anti-patterns, recommends improvements for scalability and maintainability, and validates adherence to established design principles.

name: Change Lifecycle Manager
description: Manages OpenSpec change proposals through their full lifecycle from draft to archive.
longDescription: Coordinates OpenSpec change proposals, tracks state transitions, enforces governance workflows, and ensures all changes follow the approved lifecycle before merging into the workspace.

name: Compliance Reviewer
description: Audits workspace artifacts for policy compliance and security posture.
longDescription: Scans code, configuration, and documentation for policy violations, security misconfigurations, and regulatory compliance issues. Produces structured findings with remediation guidance.

name: Database Architect
description: Designs and reviews database schemas, query performance, and data modeling strategies.
longDescription: Designs normalized and denormalized schemas, reviews existing data models for performance bottlenecks, recommends indexing strategies, and validates migration paths for evolving schemas.

name: Dependency Coordinator
description: Manages cross-package dependency upgrades and version alignment across the monorepo.
longDescription: Coordinates dependency upgrades across all workspace packages, detects version conflicts, validates peer dependency constraints, and generates upgrade plans with backward compatibility checks.

name: DevOps Engineer
description: Handles CI/CD pipelines, container configuration, and infrastructure-as-code tasks.
longDescription: Designs and maintains CI/CD workflows, writes Dockerfiles and compose configurations, manages Kubernetes manifests, and implements infrastructure automation across cloud and on-premise environments.

name: Documentation Expert
description: Writes, audits, and improves technical documentation across all TLP classification levels.
longDescription: Creates and refines READMEs, API docs, architecture decision records, runbooks, and user guides. Enforces TLP classification rules and ensures documentation completeness and accuracy.

name: Frontend Developer
description: Design-system-driven frontend development with WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility enforcement.
longDescription: Implements React components with design token compliance, responsive layouts, and full accessibility auditing. Enforces dcyfr design system rules and validates against WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

name: Fullstack Developer
description: End-to-end feature development spanning frontend, API routes, and backend services.
longDescription: Implements complete features across the full stack: React UI, Next.js API routes, database interactions, and service integrations. Coordinates frontend and backend concerns in a single coherent implementation.

name: Governance Reviewer
description: Validates workspace governance artifacts including AGENTS.md, OpenSpec, and TLP policies.
longDescription: Reviews governance documents for consistency, completeness, and policy alignment. Validates OpenSpec proposals against governance rules and flags deviations from established workspace protocols.

name: Knowledge Governance Specialist
description: Manages the workspace knowledge base, ontology, and information classification.
longDescription: Maintains the dcyfr knowledge graph, enforces ontology standards, classifies information artifacts by TLP level, and ensures knowledge base integrity across workspace evolution.

name: Performance Profiler
description: Profiles and optimizes application performance across frontend, backend, and database layers.
longDescription: Identifies performance bottlenecks through profiling analysis, recommends optimizations for render performance, API latency, database query efficiency, and bundle size reduction.

name: Security Engineer
description: Performs security audits, threat modeling, and vulnerability assessments.
longDescription: Conducts comprehensive security reviews including SAST, dependency vulnerability scanning, threat modeling, secrets detection, and OWASP Top 10 analysis with prioritized remediation plans.

name: Test Engineer
description: Designs and implements comprehensive test suites across unit, integration, and e2e layers.
longDescription: Writes and audits unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end test suites. Enforces coverage thresholds, identifies test gaps, and implements testing strategies for complex async scenarios.

name: TypeScript Pro
description: Advanced TypeScript type system engineering, strict mode enforcement, and type safety auditing.
longDescription: Tackles complex TypeScript generics, conditional types, mapped types, and template literal types. Enforces strict mode compliance, audits type safety gaps, and resolves deep type inference issues.

name: Worktree Coordinator
description: Manages git worktree isolation for concurrent OpenSpec changes across the workspace.
longDescription: Creates and manages git worktrees for parallel development streams, enforces worktree isolation policies, detects conflicts between concurrent changes, and coordinates safe merges back to main.
